ops.title: Release synckit v0.9.0 with watchman integration fixes
ops.description: Fix watchman FSEvents exhaustion (approved plan): watch-project + filtered per-repo subscriptions + failed-dir retry in watchbackend/watchman.go; restart-with-backoff supervision in daemon/serve.go; fsnotify recursive hardening ride-along for cookiesync. Then tag v0.9.0 → goreleaser → yasyf/tap, roll out on this host (brew upgrade + kickstart + watchman reap), and apply Measures 2–3 (/etc/watchman.json idle_reap_age_seconds=86400; core.fsmonitorHookVersion=2 in ~/.config/git/superset-perf.gitconfig). Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-12/plans/users-yasyf-claude-plan-s-splendid-herd-wondrous-gem.md

ops.text: tag v0.9.0 pushed, release workflow green, brew serves v0.9.0
after rollout: watchman watch-list shows ~39 per-repo roots (not ~90-115 per-leaf), count stable across a second kickstart
supervision verified: watchman shutdown-server mid-run → synckitd logs backend error, restarts with backoff, events flow again
/etc/watchman.json has idle_reap_age_seconds 86400 and core.fsmonitorhookversion resolves to 2
